subcodes.first_line: Nightingales are inebriated by the melody of His enrapturing Call, and spirit lovers by one draught of His enrapturing Call
subcodes.first_line_orig: مستند بلبلان ز نغمه یاهوی او هم جان ... هم جان عاشقان ز جرعه یاهوی او جان بجانان
